source_meta.source_document: Restoration Modular Revision Hip System Surgical Protocol and Trident II

systems.system_notes: Revision total hip construct anchored to official Stryker Restoration Modular revision materials and Trident II acetabular materials.

trays.tray_notes: Official Restoration revision materials support dedicated modular revision instrumentation paired with compatible Trident II acetabular workflow.

components.component_notes: Official Restoration revision materials describe distal stem options across multiple lengths and diameters.
Official Restoration modular revision materials describe proximal cone body options used to reconstruct revision anatomy.
Official Trident II materials describe the acetabular shell family used in revision hip constructs.
Official Trident II materials describe compatible polyethylene and modular bearing options used with the revision acetabular construct.
Official Stryker revision construct materials describe modular femoral head options used with Restoration and Trident.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The current Restoration and Trident II public source set confirms the revision construct and component families but this pass does not include a clean single revision implant code matrix row.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper catalogue, IFU, or supply-chain resource pass is needed for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
